name: TrinityDSE
description: Trinity-built Data Security Encryption engine. AES-256, RSA-4096, post-quantum crypto (Kyber), MFA, secure SQLite storage, automatic key rotation.
author: Victory + Trinity

tools.name: dse_status
tools.description: DSE engine status — key rotation time, storage, MFA status

tools.name: dse_register
tools.description: Register a user with hashed password and MFA — username|password|role

tools.name: dse_rotate_keys
tools.description: Force immediate key rotation on the DSE engine
